domain: Tongan ngatu / tapa cloth (Tonga, Polynesia; large communal bark-cloth panels imprinted via kupesi stencils into a grid of motif cells; localized defects = phase deviations from neighborhood pattern; repair by stitch-overlay/patch integrating into surrounding kupesi grid)
specific_mechanism: NGATU-DEFECT: per-head positional-grid defect detector. (1) Treat each token's RoPE rotation phase as a 1D cell in an attention-pattern grid. (2) Over a sliding window of K tokens, compute a discrete cohomology cocycle invariant on the phase differences (sum of signed phase jumps around the window). (3) If the cocycle is nonzero (defect detected), apply a per-head correction-projection P_repair that re-aligns phases to a smooth local cocycle. (4) Optionally aggregate persistent-homology H0/H1 features across heads to detect multi-head pattern defects. Trained with auxiliary defect-regularization loss.
llm_application: NGATU-DEFECT for transformer attention: a topological-defect repair layer that monitors per-head positional-grid phase coherence in the RoPE-encoded attention pattern. Sliding-window discrete cohomology cocycle invariant flags phase-deviation cells; correction-projection P_repair smooths the local pattern. Auxiliary persistent-homology features detect multi-head defects. Differs from 2605.03163 Topology-Aware Attention (which injects persistent-homology bias into logits — not RoPE-phase cocycle repair), 2112.15210 Persformer (PH on persistence diagrams not RoPE phase), IJSAT 2026 PH-Transformer Defect (defect= overfitting hint not RoPE phase), Topo Protein-LM (token classification not phase repair). Differs from R425 NDEBELE-TRIANGLE (boundary-defect not in-bulk cocycle), R436 HUTSUL-PYSANKA (rotational symmetry not phase cocycle), R103 KNOT-CoT (CoT trajectory topology not attention pattern grid) by EXPLICIT RoPE-PHASE COHOMOLOGY COCYCLE + LOCAL CORRECTION PROJECTION.
novelty_claim: Topology-Aware Attention + Persformer + PH-Transformer + Topo Protein-LM cover transformer topology and defect-detection space. NGATU-DEFECT adds (a) RoPE-phase cohomology cocycle as the defect invariant + (b) per-head correction-projection P_repair on detected cells. Recombination — both pieces individually exist as adjacent literature.
